name: Lore Drop Planner
description: Plan episodic reveals, callbacks, teasers, and payoff arcs for personality-led brands, then output a lore release schedule.
short_description: Sequence reveals, callbacks, teasers, and payoffs.
audience: Launch teams coordinating teasers, reveals, and callbacks
Founder-led brands turning open loops into clear payoff arcs
detail_lines: Turns canon maps, campaign notes, unresolved mysteries, callbacks, launch windows, and dates into a timed release schedule.
Keeps reveal, teaser, callback, payoff, cross-format, pause, and reset rules visible so arcs stay coherent.
Works only from public or user-authorized material and rejects fake emergencies, manipulative ambiguity, and anxiety-driven bait.
